name: Sauteed Apple Salad with Roqufort and Walnuts
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sherry or Red Wine Vinegar
4 large apples, Golden Delicious, peeled, cored, and cut into 12 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together vinegar and thyme (or dried thyme).
2. Gradually whisk in half the olive oil until well combined.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Heat remaining olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
5. Add apple slices and sugar; sauté for 8 minutes or until apples are tender.
6. Increase heat to high and sauté for an additional 5 minutes, or until apples are golden brown.
7. Divide salad greens among eight plates.
8. Arrange six apple slices on the greens.
9. Sprinkle with toasted walnuts and crumbled Roquefort cheese.
10. Drizzle with dressing just before serving.
Everything can be prepared in advance and taken to the dinner table in separate containers, arranged just before serving to avoid wilting.
